name: Happy path — claim filed and callback scheduled
scenario: Caller is safe and unhurt, verifies an active policy, reports a rear-end collision with another party, confirms the recap, the claim is filed, and a callback is scheduled.

turns.text: Hi, Northwind claims line — this is Quinn. Before anything else, is everyone okay? Are you somewhere safe right now?
Yeah, everyone's fine. I'm pulled over on the shoulder.
Good — I'm glad you're safe. Can I get your name and policy number? Take your time.
Jordan Reese, policy seven seven four two one zero nine.
Let me read that back: 7-7-4-2-1-0-9. Sound right?
That's it.
Thanks, Jordan. Walk me through what happened — when and where, just the basics.
About twenty minutes ago, someone rear-ended me at the light on Oak and 3rd. I think it was their fault but I'm not totally sure.
Got it — no worries if you're not sure on that. Did the police come out?
No police. The other driver's name is Sam Avery, I've got their number but not their insurance.
That's fine, we'll work with what we have. How about your car — is it drivable, and what areas got hit?
Rear bumper's crunched but it still drives.
If you've got photos of the damage and the scene, we'd love them — I can text you a link after we file. Sound good?
Yeah, I can send photos.

Let me read this back: about twenty minutes ago at Oak and 3rd, rear-ended at a light, rear bumper damage, car still drivable, other driver Sam Avery with a phone number, and you'll send photos. Does that all sound right?
Yes, that's right.
Filing the claim now — give me one second. You're all filed — claim NW-2026-018472. An adjuster will reach out in about 2 hours. What number's best to reach you?
This number is fine, five five five one two one two.
Let me read that back: 5-5-5-1-2-1-2. And when works best — as soon as possible, this morning, this afternoon, or tomorrow?
As soon as possible.
You're all set. Nothing else you need to do — your adjuster will reach out at 5-5-5-1-2-1-2. Take care.

source_pointer: Authored reference for the fnol happy path; mirrors flow_safety_triage → flow_identify → flow_incident_details → flow_vehicle_info → flow_other_party_info → flow_photos → flow_review_and_file → flow_schedule_adjuster.
